text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Shopping took longer than I thought! I'm barely
going to make it to training!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
"Limited Time Lecture! Differentiating Fur Seals,
True Seals, and Sea Lions"...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: H-how neat! I know training is starting soon, but...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I couldn't resist. I ended up staying until the end.
I'm so sorry...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Regardless of the subject of the lecture, she does
seem to be genuinely sorry, so I let her off with a
light warning.
